summary: Tested Academic Coverage Dashboard feature for Prashnakosh V1. All 16 backend tests pass (100%). All 14 frontend tests pass (100%). The dashboard correctly shows hierarchical coverage data (Department → Section → Lesson → Topic) using ONLY approved questions for coverage calculations.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/departments/:id/academic-coverage correctly returns hierarchical coverage data
Coverage uses ONLY approved questions (not draft/pending/rejected) as required
weakSections, weakLessons, weakTopics are correctly sorted by coverage (ascending)
Lesson and Topic breakdowns are correctly nested within sections
Department access validation returns 403 for unauthorized departments
Frontend Academic Coverage page loads within 5 seconds as required
Department selector dropdown works on the page
HOD dashboard has 'Academic Coverage' navigation button
Back button correctly navigates to dashboard
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data. IX_Science department has 22 questions (15 approved, 7 pending). Section A: 12/20 approved (60%), Section B: 3/15 (20%), Section C: 0/6 (0%).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Academic Coverage Dashboard feature is fully functional. API endpoint GET /api/departments/:id/academic-coverage returns correct hierarchical coverage data. Frontend page at /hod/academic-coverage shows Department Overview card with Total Questions, Approved, Pending, Required, Overall Coverage. Attention Required card shows weak sections/lessons/topics sorted by coverage. Blueprint sections are expandable to show lessons, which are expandable to show topics. Each level shows Required/Approved/Pending/Coverage%/Need/Status. Department selector dropdown works. Back button navigates to dashboard.
